macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Macroeconomic Realities Reshape U.S. Business Outlooks
items.summary: U.S. business optimism declined to 6.06/10 in March per Principal Financial Well Being Index, down 6% from January, amid rising inflation concerns (+7 points), global financial stability worries (+6 points), recession fears (+8 points), and energy price volatility affecting 48% of employers; only 17% see U.S. economy growing.

items.title: Oil Prices Jump Fueling Inflation Concerns; Rupiah Heads for Monthly Loss
items.summary: Oil prices surged, raising fears of higher global inflation; Indonesian Rupiah weakens on strong dollar and fiscal issues, while markets slid 7.8% in March due to Middle East conflict and inflation tied to oil near USD 100; RBA minutes warn of inflation potentially reaching 5% in Q2.

items.title: White House Economist Highlights Soaring Markets, Falling Oil Prices, U.S.-Iran Progress
items.summary: Kevin Hassett discusses stock market surge amid plummeting oil prices, U.S.-Iran negotiations progress, strong economy from tax policy and investment, no tax on tips, jobs outlook, new Fed leadership with Kevin Warsh, and AI safety measures.

items.title: April CPI and PPI Data Set for Release Amid Elevated Inflation and Energy Pressures
items.summary: Upcoming April CPI on May 12 expected to reflect March's 3.3% YoY high driven by 21.2% gasoline surge from Middle East escalation; PPI on May 13 to show upstream pressures, with Fed holding rates at 3.50–3.75% citing global energy prices.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges Past $82,000 Amid ETF Inflows and Reduced Iran Tensions
items.summary: Bitcoin reached a new multi-month peak at $82,000, driven by $467 million in U.S. spot Bitcoin ETF inflows, optimism over potential U.S.-Iran deal progress, and enthusiasm around AI and tech earnings boosting Nasdaq.

items.title: Digital Asset Funds See $117.8M Inflow, Erasing Midweek $619M Outflows
items.summary: Digital asset funds recorded $117.8 million inflows, primarily into Bitcoin ($192M), breaking a four-week outflow streak, while Ethereum and Solana saw outflows amid steady institutional demand.

items.title: Circle Shares Jump 20% as U.S. Lawmakers Reach Stablecoin Deal
items.summary: Circle's shares surged 20% following a stablecoin regulatory compromise by lawmakers, though opposed by five major banking trade groups shortly after release.

items.title: Zcash Surges 29% as $2.7B Hedge Fund Multicoin Capital Reveals Significant ZEC Position
items.summary: Zcash led top performers with a 29% gain after Multicoin Capital disclosed a major stake, fueling speculation of price targets up to $800; crypto market cap hit $2.69 trillion.

items.title: Toncoin Skyrockets 30-45% on Telegram Takeover and Fee Cuts
items.summary: Toncoin jumped 30-45% after Pavel Durov announced Telegram would manage the project, slashing fees to one-sixth and aiming for mass-market adoption.

items.title: MicroStrategy Considers First Bitcoin Sale to Fund $1.5B Dividend
items.summary: MicroStrategy's Michael Saylor revealed plans to potentially liquidate part of its 818,334 BTC holdings for dividend payments, causing shares to drop 4% and brief BTC dip.

items.title: a16z Crypto Closes $2.2B Fund for Builders Across All Stages
items.summary: Andreessen Horowitz's crypto arm closed a $2.2 billion fund to support blockchain builders at all development stages.

items.title: Coinbase Cuts 14% of Jobs to Become 'Lean, Fast, AI-Native'
items.summary: Coinbase announced a 14% workforce reduction to streamline operations and pivot toward an AI-native structure.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: IBM Research unveils breakthrough analog AI chip for efficient deep learning
items.summary: IBM Research has announced a groundbreaking analog AI chip that demonstrates remarkable efficiency and accuracy in performing complex computations for deep neural networks (DNNs).

items.title: Google tests Remy AI agent for Gemini with focus on user control
items.summary: Google is testing Remy, an internal Gemini AI agent designed to act for users, monitor relevant information, and learn their preferences.

items.title: US and Japan announce sweeping AI and tech collaboration
items.summary: The US and Japan have unveiled a raft of new AI, quantum computing, semiconductors, and other critical technology initiatives.

items.title: Asylon and Thrive Logic bring physical AI to enterprise perimeter security
items.summary: A partnership between Asylon and Thrive Logic advances physical AI security solutions for high-worth enterprise perimeter applications.

items.title: Meta hires four more OpenAI researchers
items.summary: Meta has hired four OpenAI researchers including Shengjia Zhao, Jiahui Yu, Shuchao Bi, and Hongyu Ren, continuing the talent migration between major AI labs.

items.title: Google bakes agentic AI governance into Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform
items.summary: Google has integrated agentic AI governance directly into its new Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, though enterprise adoption still lags behind the technology.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Neverwinter Arena Ends with New Celestial Rings and Combat Enchants; Gear Nerfs Reverted
items.summary: Recent Neverwinter updates include the end of the Arena, introduction of Celestial Rings and Combat Enchants, reversion of old gear nerfs, and changes to Snake Companion. Video covers news and upcoming changes posted 3 hours ago.

items.title: Jagex Announces Grand Exchange Update in OSRS, Set to Make Players Wealthy
items.summary: Jagex is implementing a Grand Exchange update in Old School RuneScape that will significantly boost player wealth, with discussions on reward shops availability post-temporary game modes.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Samsung Achieves $1 Trillion Valuation, Outperforms Apple and Microsoft
items.summary: Samsung Electronics has reached a $1 trillion valuation milestone, surpassing major tech giants in operating profit for a single quarter, driven largely by strong demand for memory chips.

items.title: Budget Electronics Era May Be Ending Due to Chip Shortage
items.summary: Major manufacturers including Microsoft, Samsung, Dell, and Apple are discontinuing budget models and raising prices due to a memory chip shortage, with the budget electronics segment potentially disappearing by 2028.

items.title: Apple to Pay $250 Million Settlement for Delayed Siri AI Features
items.summary: Apple has agreed to a $250 million settlement in a California class action lawsuit over its failure to deliver AI-powered Siri features on schedule.

items.title: NASA Develops New Technology for Testing Materials in Extreme Lunar Conditions
items.summary: NASA Glenn researchers have created a groundbreaking method for testing how materials withstand the extreme cold of space environments like the lunar night.
